title: Channel
description: A notification channel used to watch for resource changes.

kind.description: Identifies this as a notification channel.

id.description: A UUID or similar unique string that identifies this channel.

resourceId.description: An opaque value that identifies the watched resource.

resourceUri.description: A version-specific identifier for the watched resource.

token.description: An arbitrary string delivered to the target address with each notification.

expiration.description: Date and time of notification channel expiration, expressed in milliseconds since the epoch.

type.description: The type of delivery mechanism used for this channel.

address.description: The address where notifications are delivered for this channel.

params.description: Additional parameters controlling delivery channel behavior.

payload.description: Whether the payload of each notification event is expected.
